methodology_sections: 1.1 Asset Inventory - Financial assets, state assets, privilege assets, reputation assets
1.3 System Architecture Mapping - Contract hierarchies, dependencies, upgrade patterns, access control
2.1 Entry Point Enumeration - Public/external functions, callbacks, parameter analysis

financial_assets: ERC20 tokens held by connectors (arbitrary trusted tokens, including baseToken)
ETH held transiently by LidoConnector (via receive() and WETH unwrap/wrap)
Uniswap V3 LP NFTs held by UNIv3Connector/PancakeswapConnector (ERC721 positions)
Lido Withdrawal NFTs/requests handled via ILidoWithdrawal (ERC721-like approval/claim flow)
Stargate LP tokens and staked LP positions (IStargateLPStaking + pool LP token balances)
Debt positions across lending protocols (Aave, Compound Comet, Silo, Prisma, Dolomite, Gearbox)
Flash-loaned ERC20 tokens via BalancerVault flashLoan() (temporary custody in BalancerFlashLoan and receiver connector)
Cross-chain bridged assets via LiFi routes (tokens pulled from connector via callback) and LayerZero messaging fees (native balance held in LZHelperSender.receive())
state_assets: PositionRegistry.vaults[vaultId] (Vault struct: accountManager, baseToken, enabled, connectors map, trustedPositionsBP map, holdingPositions array, isPositionUsed map, governance addresses)
Connector enable flags per vault: vault.connectors[addr].enabled
Trusted token allowlists per connector and per accountingManager connector: trustedTokens[token] => bool
Trusted positions mapping: trustedPositionsBP[positionId] => PositionBP(calculatorConnector, positionTypeId, onlyOwner, isEnabled, isDebt, data, additionalData)
Holding positions array per vault: holdingPositions[] (calculatorConnector, connector, positionId, data, additionalData, positionTimestamp)
Holding position index map: isPositionUsed[holdingPositionId] => index (0 reserved as sentinel)
Keepers multisig: isOwner[address], nonce, threshold, numOwners, EIP712 domain separator state
SwapAndBridgeHandler: routes[], isEligibleToUse[address], valueOracle, slippageTolerance[input][output], genericSlippageTolerance
LifiImplementation: isHandler[address], isBridgeWhiteListed[string], isChainSupported[chainId], lifi address
LZHelperSender/LZHelperReceiver: chainInfo mappings, vaultIdToVaultInfo mappings, messageSetting bytes
BaseConnector: swapHandler, valueOracle, minimumHealthFactor, MINIMUM_HEALTH_FACTOR constant, DUST_LEVEL
BalancerFlashLoan: vault(IBalancerVault), registry(PositionRegistry), caller (last makeFlashLoan caller)
privilege_assets: PositionRegistry roles: GOVERNER_ROLE (admin of itself/maintainer/emergency), MAINTAINER_ROLE, EMERGENCY_ROLE
Per-vault governance addresses stored in registry: governer, maintainer, maintainerWithoutTimeLock, keeperContract, watcherContract, emergency
Connector-onlyManager gating (keeperContract OR emergency OR registry.flashLoan()) via NoyaGovernanceBase
SwapAndBridgeHandler eligible user allowlist (isEligibleToUse) controlling executeSwap/executeBridge access
LifiImplementation Ownable2Step owner controls handlers/chains/bridge blacklist and can rescue funds
Keepers Ownable2Step owner controls owner-set (isOwner) and threshold; transaction execution requires sorted signatures meeting threshold
LayerZero OApp ownership (LZHelperSender/LZHelperReceiver): onlyOwner can set chain/vault info and message settings
Omnichain bridge approval timestamps (approvedBridgeTXN) control delayed bridge execution
reputation_assets: Vault share value/TVL correctness relies on registry holdingPositions + connector TVL implementations (risk to protocol accounting reputation)
Cross-chain TVL sync integrity (LayerZero sender/receiver mappings and lzHelper trust) affects reported TVL reputation
Keeper multisig integrity (signature verification, nonce) impacts trust in strategy execution
Watcher verification hook (verifyRemoveLiquidity) is currently a no-op in provided code, impacting perceived safety guarantees

system_architecture.inheritance_hierarchy: PositionRegistry inherits OpenZeppelin AccessControl + ReentrancyGuard. NoyaGovernanceBase is a standalone auth helper used by BaseConnector and SwapAndBridgeHandler. BaseConnector inherits NoyaGovernanceBase + ReentrancyGuard and implements IConnector base functions, extended by many protocol-specific connectors (AaveConnector, CompoundConnector, etc.). OmnichainLogic is an abstract connector extending BaseConnector, with concrete OmnichainManagerBaseChain/NormalChain. Keepers inherits OZ EIP712 + Ownable2Step; Watchers inherits Keepers. SwapAndBridgeHandler inherits NoyaGovernanceBase + ReentrancyGuard. LifiImplementation inherits Ownable2Step + ReentrancyGuard and implements ISwapAndBridgeImplementation. LZHelperSender/LZHelperReceiver inherit LayerZero OAppSender/OAppReceiver via OApp core classes. BalancerFlashLoan implements IFlashLoanRecipient + ReentrancyGuard.
external_dependencies: OpenZeppelin Contracts v5: AccessControl, ReentrancyGuard, SafeERC20, Ownable/Ownable2Step, EIP712, ECDSA, ERC721Holder, IERC721Receiver
LiFi: ILiFi (extractGenericSwapParameters, extractBridgeData) via external call

Multiple DeFi protocol interfaces: Uniswap V3 (INonfungiblePositionManager, IUniswapV3Factory/Pool libs), Aave IPool, Compound Comet+Rewards, Silo, Prisma, Dolomite, Stargate, SNX V3 CoreProxy, Gearbox V3
system_architecture.upgrade_patterns: None detected in provided contracts (no proxies/initializers/diamondCut). All contracts use constructors and immutable variables in some connectors.
system_architecture.access_control_structure: Global registry-level AccessControl (GOVERNER_ROLE admin for MAINTAINER_ROLE and EMERGENCY_ROLE). Vault-level governance is stored per vault in PositionRegistry and enforced by NoyaGovernanceBase modifiers (onlyManager/onlyMaintainer/onlyGovernance/etc.). SwapAndBridgeHandler additionally restricts operational entry points by an allowlist (isEligibleToUse). LifiImplementation and Keepers use Ownable2Step. LayerZero helper contracts use Ownable (via OAppCore owner) for configuration.

state_changes: roles granted and role admins set
vault.isPositionUsed[holdingPositionId] and potentially swapped index key

entry_points.function: execute(address destination,bytes data,uint256 gasLimit,address executor,bytes32[] sigR,bytes32[] sigS,uint8[] sigV,uint256 deadline)

state_changes: registry holding token position (via registry.updateHoldingPosition) depending on balances
indirect via target connector + registry updates

entry_points.function: swapHoldings(address[] tokensIn,address[] tokensOut,uint256[] amountsIn,bytes[] swapData,uint256[] routeIds)

state_changes: registry holding position for omnichain TVL (add/remove) with positionTimestamp
native balance spent via _lzSend (fee param uses address(this).balance)
Uniswap V3 NFT minted to this contract
Uniswap V3 position liquidity decreased and fees collected
ERC721 transfer of position NFT to masterchef

entry_points.function: withdraw(address siloToken,address wToken,uint256 amount,bool oC,bool closePosition)
openTrove(IStakeNTroveZap zap,address tm,uint256 maxFee,uint256 dAmount,uint256 bAmount)
adjustTrove(IStakeNTroveZap zapContract,address tm,uint256 mFee,uint256 wAmount,uint256 bAmount,bool isBorrowing)

state_changes: allowance to router for LP token

entry_points.function: executeCommands(address facade,address creditAccount,MultiCall[] calls,address approvalToken,uint256 amount)
state_changes: registry token positions updated for enableToken calls
ETH submitted to Lido => stETH received
registry holding position add with requestId/amount
approval of withdrawal token to lidoWithdrawal
ETH received then wrapped to WETH
token balances moved to receiver and back
external arbitrary calls to destinationConnector[i] with provided gas and calldata

upgradeability_surface.notes: Uses constructor; no proxy hooks detected.
All connectors use constructors; no delegatecall/proxy pattern detected.
LayerZero OAppCore ownership; no upgrade proxy in provided snippet.
Stateless-ish flashloan receiver with caller tracking; no proxy.
